name: Jomiel L. Enriquez
title: Senior Software Engineer
C#/.NET & Azure Fullstack Engineer
AI-Assisted Cloud Integrations Specialist
about: Senior Software Engineer with over 7 years of cumulative technical experience (5+ years professional) designing, building, and supporting enterprise-scale applications and integration services within the Insurance, Audit & Advisory, and Supply Chain sectors — domains that carry the same regulatory rigor and data-integrity demands as Financial Services and Asset Management.

Deep expertise across the .NET ecosystem (Core, Framework, ASP.NET MVC) building resilient REST APIs, microservices-based integration layers, and modular decomposition of legacy applications, deployed cloud-natively on Microsoft Azure with automated CI/CD pipelines via Azure DevOps and GitHub Actions. Strong relational database background across SQL Server and Oracle, plus Python for automation scripting.

Actively pioneers AI-assisted development tools — Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and Cursor — throughout the engineering lifecycle to accelerate coding, testing, and troubleshooting, while contributing to code reviews, technical governance, and Agile ceremonies.

skills.label: Languages
skills.items: C#, SQL, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS

skills.label: Cloud & Ops
skills.items: Microsoft Azure, CI/CD, Git / GitHub, Azure DevOps, REST API, Microservices, AWS, Agile / Jira

skills.label: Frameworks
skills.items: .NET / ASP.NET MVC, React, Vue 3, Angular, Node.js, React Native, jQuery

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering

1.title: Senior Developer
1.Description:
● Drive end-to-end development, support, and release execution across two core insurance systems: a legacy enterprise application built on .NET Framework and a modular, cloud-native ecosystem utilizing a 5-microservice .NET Core backend and React frontend with REST APIs.
● Develop and test a new insurance platform using Next.js, Azure MSAL, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Blob Storage, Express, Zod, and JWT/JWKS for secure API authentication, built with Claude Code as the primary AI-assisted development tool and GitHub Copilot for accelerating .NET feature delivery.
● Manage cloud infrastructure configurations on Microsoft Azure to support secure, reliable service delivery across enterprise systems.
● Provide technical governance and quality assurance by reviewing the architectural and code contributions of peer Senior Developers to ensure system reliability and alignment with SOLID standards.
● Actively participate in and guide Agile ceremonies, including daily stand-ups, backlog grooming, and sprint refinements to maintain high delivery velocity.

1.title: Software Engineer
1.Description:
● Engineered a secure RESTful API for background check integrations, handling sensitive data for global enterprise clients.
● Optimized a global contingent workforce system by contributing to the Vue 3 migration, resulting in a 25% increase in frontend rendering performance.
● Collaborated with cross-functional Agile teams to deliver scalable solutions across a complex Oracle and SQL Server database landscape.

1.title: C# .NET Developer
1.Description:
● Contributed to modular decomposition and refactoring of a supply chain management system, diagnosing and resolving client-reported defects across front-end and back-end layers to reduce technical debt and ensure business continuity.
● Developed bug fixes and feature enhancements using HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+), and C#, maintaining high code quality and system stability.
● Managed source code versioning and branching strategies using TFS, Azure DevOps, and Git.
● Maintained and optimized client databases in SQL Server and Oracle DB, authoring queries and stored procedures to ensure data integrity and performance.

1.title: C# .NET Developer
1.Description:
● Developed and maintained internal enterprise web applications using ASP.NET, C#, Angular, and Oracle SQL, supporting the firm's audit and advisory practice operations.
● Built and optimized database stored procedures and complex queries using Oracle PL/SQL and SQL Server to support reporting and data management requirements.
● Utilized Azure DevOps for source control, branch management, code reviews, and CI/CD pipeline execution.
● Collaborated with senior engineers to deliver bug fixes and feature enhancements within defined sprint timelines using Agile methodology.

0.Title: Higher Education Digital Transformation Ecosystem
0.Description: Directed the end-to-end digital overhaul for Colegio De Laurel, designing three interconnected systems (Admission, Enrollment, and Public Portal). Migrated the institution from manual, paper-based processes to a secure, cloud-native infrastructure with automated CI/CD pipelines and REST APIs.
0.Skills: React, .NET Core, AWS, GitHub Actions, MSSQL, REST API
